Home / Service Areas / Peoria

Dentist in Peoria, AZ

Trusted local professionals serving Peoria and surrounding communities

Serving Peoria, AZ

Legacy Dentist is excited to serve the residents of Peoria, Arizona, a thriving city with a population of approximately 190,000. Peoria’s blend of suburban comfort and outdoor recreation makes it a great place to live, though the extreme summer heat—often exceeding 110°F—can impact oral health. Our practice provides comprehensive dental care, from pediatric services to adult treatments, ensuring your family’s smiles stay healthy year-round. Whether you’re enjoying Lake Pleasant or exploring the city, we’re here to support your dental needs.

Peoria’s family-friendly neighborhoods and outdoor activities are balanced by the need for proactive oral care in the desert climate.

Dentist Services in Peoria

Preventive Dentistry

Comprehensive care to protect your smile from Arizona's unique dental challenges.

Learn more →

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhance your smile with treatments designed for Scottsdale's active lifestyle.

Learn more →

Dental Implants

Permanent tooth replacement for Scottsdale's active adults.

Learn more →

Root Canal Therapy

Gentle, effective treatment to save damaged teeth and relieve pain.

Learn more →

Pediatric Dentistry

Gentle dental care for Scottsdale's youngest smiles.

Learn more →

Emergency Dentistry

Prompt care when dental emergencies disrupt your Scottsdale day.

Learn more →

Senior Dentistry

Specialized dental care for Scottsdale's active older adults.

Learn more →
